TABLE.NAME: elediacheckin
TABLE.COMMENT: Activity instance row, one per course module.

FIELD.NAME: ziele
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated list of ziel values this activity draws from (e.g. 'checkin,checkout,impuls').

FIELD.NAME: categories
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated list of category IDs to include. Empty = all allowed for the selected ziele.

FIELD.NAME: zielgruppe
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated list of zielgruppe filter values. Empty = no restriction; matching uses or-untagged semantics.

FIELD.NAME: kontext
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated list of kontext filter values. Empty = no restriction; matching uses or-untagged semantics.

FIELD.NAME: contentlang
FIELD.COMMENT: Content language override. Empty = resolve from course/user.

FIELD.NAME: avoidrepeat
FIELD.COMMENT: If set, the provider avoids repeating the previous question within a session.

FIELD.NAME: ownquestions
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional teacher-authored extra questions, one per line. Merged additively into the random draw pool for this activity. Virtual category 'eigene'.

TABLE.NAME: elediacheckin_question
TABLE.COMMENT: Locally synchronised question cards from a content bundle. 'stage' distinguishes live (0) from staging (1) rows; only live rows are read by the provider.

FIELD.NAME: stage
FIELD.COMMENT: 0 = live (read by provider), 1 = staging (being written by sync).

FIELD.NAME: bundleid
FIELD.COMMENT: bundle_id of the source bundle.

FIELD.NAME: bundleversion
FIELD.COMMENT: bundle_version of the source bundle.

FIELD.NAME: externalid
FIELD.COMMENT: Stable id from the JSON bundle.

FIELD.NAME: categories
FIELD.COMMENT: Comma-separated list of category ids (matches the enum for the chosen ziel).

FIELD.NAME: zielgruppe
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional CSV of zielgruppe tags (enum). Empty = untagged (matches any activity-level filter).

FIELD.NAME: kontext
FIELD.COMMENT: Optional CSV of kontext tags (enum). Empty = untagged (matches any activity-level filter).

FIELD.NAME: frage
FIELD.COMMENT: The card/question text shown to learners.

FIELD.NAME: antwort
FIELD.COMMENT: Back-of-card answer. Only populated when hasanswer = 1.

FIELD.NAME: quelle
FIELD.COMMENT: Citation/source reference (e.g. for quotes).

FIELD.NAME: qversion
FIELD.COMMENT: Per-question version string from the bundle.

FIELD.NAME: qstatus
FIELD.COMMENT: draft|published|deprecated — provider filters by this.

FIELD.NAME: extcreated
FIELD.COMMENT: created_at from the bundle, Unix ts.

FIELD.NAME: extmodified
FIELD.COMMENT: updated_at from the bundle, Unix ts.

FIELD.NAME: result
FIELD.COMMENT: success, validation_error, fetch_error, other.

FIELD.NAME: source
FIELD.COMMENT: manual or scheduled.

FIELD.NAME: sourceid
FIELD.COMMENT: Content-source id that produced the bundle (bundled|git|eledia).
